summary.goal: Add additive flags to memex node edit (--decision, --artifact, --open-thread, --rejected, --goal) for incremental per-field updates without rewriting the full summary
decisions: Added --decision, --artifact, --open-thread, --rejected, --goal as additive per-field flags to node edit
Parsed --rejected values as TOML documents directly into RejectedApproach (already derives Deserialize) — no new types needed
Additive flags and --summary are mutually exclusive with a clear error
